# Copilot Instructions - Maven Microservices Project

This is a Maven-based Java project for building microservices.

## Project Structure
- `src/main/java` - Application source code
- `src/main/resources` - Application resources
- `src/test/java` - Test source code
- `src/test/resources` - Test resources
- `pom.xml` - Maven project configuration

## Building and Running
```bash
mvn clean install
mvn compile
mvn test
```

## Development Guidelines
- Add Java source files to `src/main/java/com/example/app/`
- Add tests to `src/test/java/com/example/app/`
- Update dependencies in `pom.xml` as needed
